name: HextaAI landing page
prompt: Build a premium landing page for an AI coding platform called HextaAI. It should feel premium, minimal, advanced, fast, intelligent, developer-focused, smooth, trustworthy, modern, and high-converting. Include hero, product preview, Plan Mode section, code generation section, live preview section, feature grid, workflow, pricing, FAQ, final CTA, and footer. Use Plan Mode deeply, create PLAN.md, generate multiple files one by one, run real checks, and show live preview.
